issues.name: credential-propagation-missing-or-stale
issues.invariant: A configured provider or runtime identity must use the intended credential source; missing or stale credentials remain degraded and never become ready.
issues.g0Requirement: credential propagation cannot produce false ready

regressionEvidence.testPattern: buildSystemHealthReport reports a degraded provider when CoinGlass is requested without a key

issues.name: auth-rate-limit-plan-misclassification
issues.invariant: Authentication, rate limit and plan restrictions remain distinct machine states and never mean that the market has no opportunity.

regressionEvidence.testPattern: classifyCoinGlassRuntimeFailure keeps auth, rate limit and upgrade distinct

issues.name: worker-stale-presented-online
issues.invariant: A stale or missing heartbeat is down, not online, even when a container or idle heartbeat exists.

regressionEvidence.testPattern: readWorkerHeartbeatReport marks stale or missing heartbeats down without pretending they are online

issues.name: scan-zero-clean-rows-presented-ready
issues.invariant: A successful envelope with zero clean rows is partial and cannot prove a ready deep scan.
issues.g0Requirement: zero clean rows cannot become ready

regressionEvidence.testPattern: CoinGlass provider marks zero clean rows as partial even when the API envelope succeeds

issues.name: false-running-runner-state
issues.invariant: A dead PID or stale heartbeat cannot remain running in the machine state.
issues.g0Requirement: runner liveness is process and heartbeat bound

regressionEvidence.testPattern: runner runtime marks manifest running with dead same-host pid as crashed

issues.name: old-evidence-presented-current
issues.invariant: Current production status is regenerated and stale evidence cannot prove a current PASS.

regressionEvidence.testPattern: production status regenerates current health and smoke instead of reusing stale files

issues.name: dirty-production-deploy
issues.invariant: A dirty production worktree blocks release or migration execution before mutation.
issues.g0Requirement: production source must be immutable and aligned

regressionEvidence.testPattern: rejects a dirty production worktree guard snapshot

issues.name: unknown-fact-presented-as-zero
issues.invariant: Unavailable scan facts remain null or unavailable and cannot become zero or a confidence score.

regressionEvidence.testPattern: data quality never turns unavailable scan facts into zero or a confidence score

issues.name: duplicate-or-conflated-scan-proof
issues.invariant: Observed and eligible denominators remain separate and one scan proof cannot inflate another.
issues.g0Requirement: single authoritative scan proof with explicit denominators

regressionEvidence.testPattern: scan proof keeps public observation and eligible-asset denominators separate

issues.name: nonterminal-outcome-presented-timeout
issues.invariant: Tracking, error and unavailable states remain distinct; only a real expiry may be displayed as timeout.

regressionEvidence.testPattern: timeout inference and incomplete-live claims fail governance
